title: A New Synthesis of All-trans Violet Leaf Alcohol Terpenoids. Part IX
author: O. P. Vig
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: \(trans\)  -2,6-Noradienol has been synthesised by the modified Wittig reaction with ethyl diethylphospho­noacetate on   \(trans\)  -4-hepten-1-al .
steps_raw: \(trans\)  -2,6-Noradienol has been synthesised by the modified Wittig reaction with ethyl diethylphospho­noacetate on   \(trans\)  -4-hepten-1-al .
